_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE AUTOMATICALLY GENERATED AND SAVED BY PTERODACTYL PANEL
name: Civix
author: nostalgiacraft.management@gmail.com
description: Minecraft chat toxicity analyzer — Node.js 20 + Python 3.11 + HuggingFace ML pipeline.
startup: OMP_NUM_THREADS=2 TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM=false python3 sidecar/main.py & node scripts/wait-for-sidecar.js && node src/server/index.js

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt-get update
apt-get install -y git curl

cd /mnt/server

if [ -d .git ]; then
  git pull
else
  git clone ${GITHUB_REPO} .
fi

# Install ALL deps (including devDeps) so Vite is available for the frontend build
npm ci
npm run build
# Remove devDeps after build — runtime only needs production deps
npm prune --omit=dev

echo "[Civix Install] Pre-caching HuggingFace models..."
python3 -c "
import os
from transformers import pipeline
cache = os.environ.get('TRANSFORMERS_CACHE', '/data/hf_cache')
os.makedirs(cache, exist_ok=True)
pipeline('text-classification', model='unitary/toxic-bert', cache_dir=cache)
pipeline('text-classification', model='facebook/roberta-hate-speech-dynabench-r4-target', cache_dir=cache)
pipeline('text-classification', model='s-nlp/roberta_toxicity_classifier', cache_dir=cache)
print('Models cached successfully')
"

echo "[Civix Install] Done"

variables.name: HuggingFace Cache Dir
variables.description: Where to store downloaded model weights — must point to a persistent volume so models survive reinstalls

variables.name: GitHub Repo
variables.description: Your Civix app repo to clone on install
